name: Missing Custom Error Page
description: The product does not return custom error pages to the user, possibly exposing sensitive information such as stack traces, framework details, or database information through default error pages.
detection_pattern: CONTROL node triggers error condition but EGRESS node returns default server error page without TRANSFORM node to sanitize or replace the error content. Look for error paths where EXTERNAL(web_server) sends raw error details to EGRESS without a TRANSFORM(error_page_template) mediator.
